response.justification: Bogdan is a seasoned generalist with roughly 15 years of software development experience, strong TypeScript/Node.js depth, and genuinely relevant recent exposure to MCP code generators and agentic-workflow tooling at re:cinq. However, the role requires 8+ years building production AI-driven solutions, and his AI-specific experience spans only about a year; there is no demonstrated work with vector databases, RAG architectures, evaluation pipelines, or Python, and no evidence of customer-facing technical discovery or forward-deployed consulting at staff level. The profile fits a senior product engineer far better than a staff GenAI delivery lead.
strengths: Hands-on MCP server and agentic-workflow tooling experience, directly matching key technologies in the JD
Deep TypeScript/Node.js production experience across many domains, including high-throughput low-latency systems
Long track record of mentoring, workshops, and open-source leadership suggesting strong communication skills
concerns: Only ~1 year of AI/GenAI work versus the required 8+ years building production AI solutions
No evidence of vector databases, RAG, LLM evaluation/observability pipelines, or Python proficiency
No demonstrated customer-facing discovery or forward-deployed/consulting engagement leadership; also an unexplained ~8-month gap in 2020

key_factors.factor: Missing RAG/vector DB and evaluation-pipeline expertise
Recent MCP/agentic tooling and strong TypeScript engineering
